expectation also stands attracted to this case as part of the aspect 
of non-arbitrariness while furthering the equality doctrine. Here it 
also relevant to mention that UNCRPD Committee in its General 
Comment No.6 on Article 5, equality and non-discrimination, has 
developed the idea of inclusive/transformative equality. The relevant
